pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh which explicitly greps for this exact string in the final MySQL database dump (/tmp/post_task_db.sql).
Confirmed via task.json instructions. While verifier.py extracts the note subject, it primarily validates the existence of the text body.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated patient record for 'David Chen', programmatically inserted into the FreeMED database by the environment's setup script. To succeed, the agent must create a chart note with the exact body snippet 'certified ASL (American Sign Language) interpreter MUST be scheduled' and the subject 'Accommodations - Interpreter Required'. The text snippet is strictly evaluated by checking the post-task database dump.
